name: Picadillo Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, green pepper, and garlic in olive oil until softened.
2. Add diced tomato (or crushed tomatoes) and cook slowly until well blended.
3. Brown the ground beef in the same skillet and cook with olives, raisins, and capers.
4. Meanwhile, cook rice in chicken stock until tender.
5. Mix cooked rice with other ingredients to form a moist but not wet stuffing mixture.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Stuff the prepared mixture into a 12-15 pound turkey.
